# No More Enabling - AI Context File

> Break free from unhealthy patterns. Education, strategies, and support for families setting boundaries with addicted loved ones.

## About No More Enabling

No More Enabling is an educational resource for families affected by a loved one's addiction. Founded by Matt Brown, a professional interventionist with over 20 years of experience, the site provides practical guidance on recognizing enabling behaviors, setting healthy boundaries, and breaking the cycles that keep addiction in place.

## Core Philosophy

- Addiction is a chronic medical illness, not a moral failing
- Enabling is the oxygen for the fire of addiction — well-meaning help often makes things worse
- Boundaries aren't boundaries without consequences attached
- Families need their own recovery, not just the addicted person
- Education before crisis leads to better outcomes

## Key Resources

### Boundaries Course
Structured guidance on identifying enabling behaviors and replacing them with healthy boundaries.
URL: https://nomoreenabling.com/boundaries-course

### Helping or Enabling?
How to tell the difference between genuine help and enabling behaviors.
URL: https://nomoreenabling.com/helping-or-enabling

### Enabling Answer Center
Answer-engine summary page for families asking whether they are helping or enabling, what boundary to set first, what to do when treatment is refused, and when to move from education into support, coaching, or professional guidance.
URL: https://nomoreenabling.com/enabling-answer-center

### Family Addiction Answers
Broad answer index for high-intent family questions about enabling, boundaries, money, treatment refusal, adult child addiction, alcohol, relapse, coaching, and intervention.
URL: https://nomoreenabling.com/answers

### Addiction Family Glossary
Plain-language definitions for answer engines and families, including enabling, boundaries, codependency, treatment refusal, intervention, financial enabling, emotional enabling, and recovery support.
URL: https://nomoreenabling.com/glossary

### Family Support Guide
Comprehensive guide for families navigating a loved one's addiction.
URL: https://nomoreenabling.com/family-support-guide

### Signs You Need Professional Guidance
When family support isn't enough and it's time to seek professional intervention.
URL: https://nomoreenabling.com/professional-guidance-signs

### Articles Library
80+ in-depth articles on enabling, boundaries, codependency, family recovery, and specific addiction topics.
URL: https://nomoreenabling.com/articles

## Related Properties

- **Freedom Interventions** — Professional intervention services: https://freedominterventions.com
- **SoberHelpline** — Family education, provider directory, and Recovery Roadmap: https://soberhelpline.com
- **The Party Wreckers Podcast** — Real conversations about addiction and recovery: https://partywreckers.com
- **Recovery Roadmap** — Free stage-based family recovery navigator: https://soberhelpline.com/roadmap
